name: Kojimachi
short_description: Kojimachi is a widget style pet game where you can feed and care for your pet on the island you decorate.
detailed_description:
Kojimachi is a widget pet game!

Have your island run in the background or over other applications.
Decorate your island! Feed, care, and play with your pet!


Features
  • Pets! Adopt and name your own unique pet! There are 7 pets to choose from, each with different color options!
  • Decorate! There are endless ways to customize your island with over 50 unique decorations! Furnish your island to you and your pet's liking!
  • Play! Play with your pet using different toys and mini games to keep them happy!
  • Care! Keep your pet well fed and clean to earn coins for the item shop and keep them alive! Your pet will get hungry while the game is closed so remember to visit the island often!
  • Display over applications You can run the game in the background or have it stay on top of other programs like your web browser!
  • Save islands Save up to three versions of your island to switch back to for your pet!
